# Research Brief Template (PhD-level)

## Metadata
- Work item ID:
- Title:
- Authors:
- Date:
- Related modules:

## 1. Problem and motivation
- What exact problem is being solved?
- Why now? What current limitation does this remove?
- Who benefits (lab, engineer, reviewer, standards stakeholder)?

## 2. Research questions and hypotheses
- RQ1:
- RQ2:
- Hypothesis H1 (falsifiable):
- Hypothesis H2 (falsifiable):

## 3. Related work and baseline methods
- Existing approaches and trade-offs
- Why they are insufficient for PhotonTrust objectives
- Baseline(s) to compare against

## 4. Mathematical formulation
- Variables, state definitions, and units
- Governing equations / likelihood / objective functions
- Explicit assumptions and domain of validity

## 5. Method design
- Algorithm/model description
- Numerical methods and convergence notes
- Complexity and runtime expectations

## 6. Experimental design
- Datasets/configurations
- Controls and ablations
- Metrics and statistical tests
- Sample size rationale / uncertainty treatment

## 7. Risk and failure analysis
- Expected failure modes
- Stress cases and adversarial conditions
- Mitigation plan

## 8. Reproducibility package
- Seeds and deterministic controls
- Environment and dependency versions
- Artifact list (plots, cards, raw outputs)

## 9. Acceptance criteria
- Scientific correctness criteria
- Engineering correctness criteria
- Product/reporting criteria

## 10. Decision
- Proceed / revise / reject
- Reviewer sign-off:
